changeSet.author: digitaltwinapp-api
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions_id_seq START 1;
CREATE TABLE digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions ( id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions_id_seq'), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), sender_user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.users(user_id), recipient_user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.users(user_id), currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.currencies(id), amount NUMERIC(20,8) NOT NULL, debit_tx_id BIGINT NOT NULL, credit_tx_id BIGINT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT p2p_transactions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT p2p_transactions_no_self CHECK (sender_user_id != recipient_user_id) );
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions; DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions_id_seq;
